title: Gilbertiodendron dinklagei
taxonomy: Gilbertiodendron dinklagei is a species of tree in the family Fabaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as legumes. The Fabaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies, including the Caesalpinioideae subfamily to which Gilbertiodendron dinklagei belongs. This species is also classified as a member of the genus Gilbertiodendron, which consists of several species found in the tropical forests of West Africa. Gilbertiodendron dinklagei is native to the countries of Côte d'Ivoire and Guinea in West Africa. The exact classification and taxonomy of Gilbertiodendron dinklagei may be subject to ongoing research and revisions.
